negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_4db72212-26c5-4265-a620-fdbe7b6dc3f7
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, showing a multi-lane road intersection under a clear blue sky. The road is flanked by trees on both sides, suggesting a suburban or semi-urban setting. A large semi-truck on the left two lanes over with "LIVE YOUR WAVE" on its side is prominently visible, partially obstructing the view. Several other vehicles, including cars and a red SUV, are visible ahead, waiting at the traffic light. The ego vehicle slows down to prepare to stop due to the red light ahead. As the video progresses, the vehicles to the left of the ego vehicle continue to move forward, taking a left turn at the intersection. The traffic light over the ego vehicle's lane remains red throughout the video. The surrounding environment remains consistent, with the trees and road markings clearly visible throughout the sequence. By the final frame, the ego vehicle seems to have come to a stop. The vehicles on the adjacent opposite side of the road move through the intersection in an orderly fashion, depicting a typical urban intersection with moderate traffic flow. A medium shot from a first-person perspective inside the vehicle.
